clauses.obligation: 20-year term for freestanding; shorter for non-traditional
Sign then-current FA with materially different terms, pay successor fee, building upgrades, general release
clauses.trigger: Expiration of term if in compliance
clauses.exceptions: No successor for Big-Box or Delivery

clauses.obligation: 4.5% of monthly Gross Sales
clauses.exceptions: Reduction programs: DIP, DA, RTF2, CYC

clauses.obligation: Up to 4.5% of monthly Gross Sales
Pay digital services fee
Maintain CGL $2M/occurrence, auto $1M, property at replacement cost, boiler/machinery at replacement cost, workers comp per law
Operate per MOD Manual, BK University, all BKC specifications
Complete remodels per BKC specifications by deadline
clauses.money: Varies by program; penalty: +3% royalty for default

clauses.obligation: Use approved POS, network, digital platforms, kiosks; transmit all data to BKC

clauses.restriction: No ownership/operation/interest in any hamburger business
No hamburger business within 2 miles of restaurant

clauses.exceptions: CYC: may withhold first 5 years; Carrols: until remodel completion

clauses.trigger: Late reports, unapproved equipment, maintenance, judgments
Failure to pay bills, other provisions
Failure to meet minimum financial criteria
Bankruptcy, felony, fraud, false statements, unauthorized transfer, repeated breaches

clauses.obligation: Indemnify BKC for all costs/judgments relating to restaurant operation

clauses.restriction: Cannot disclose MOD Manual or trade secrets during or after term
Cannot input trade secrets into generative AI without prior approval; must opt out of AI training

clauses.obligation: Litigation in US District Court S.D. Florida or Miami-Dade County state court
Florida law
FA + addenda + TRA/MTRA = entire agreement
Heir must be approved or sell within 12 months
20 years matching FA; shorter if property control limited
10% capitalized costs + 8.5%/10% percentage rent
12% every 5 years if BKC-owned; 125% of landlord escalation if leased

clauses.trigger: Default with cure periods (10 days non-payment, 30 days other)

clauses.obligation: Remove hazardous waste, remediate soil on termination

clauses.right: BKC right of first refusal on adjacent controlled property

clauses.obligation: 3-15 years
Geographic area designated; NOT exclusive
Open committed number/type of restaurants per schedule
Royalty/advertising/franchise fee vary by FSS Development Grade (A/B/D/F)
Maintain agreed debt/EBITDA and debt/EBITDAR ratios

clauses.trigger: Transfer, duplication of system, confidentiality breach, false information, F rating, financial ratio breach

clauses.obligation: Joint and several liability for all FA obligations
Waive all defenses, notices, presentment, demand, protest
Spouse/partner may be required to sign
